title: nasturtium lacerum
intro: Nasturtium lacerum, also known as water cress or land cress, is a type of annual herb or succulent plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of nasturtium lacerum include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant, which can help prevent cell damage and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Nasturtium lacerum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and salve, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other health issues.
